meta.title: Azal | A Complete Business Experience — by Rawajeh Holding
meta.description: Azal is a fully integrated office and commercial development by Rawajeh Holding in Al Malqa, North Riyadh. Modern architecture, flexible workspaces, and refined amenities for ambitious businesses and entrepreneurs.

hero.subtitle: A modern destination in Al Malqa where refined architecture meets flexible offices, retail, and integrated services — built for ambitious businesses and entrepreneurs.

about.title: Where Business Meets Elegance
about.body: Azal is an integrated office and commercial project by Rawajeh Holding, located in Al Malqa district on Anas bin Malik Road in North Riyadh. The project offers modern architecture, flexible office and retail spaces, and a curated set of services tailored to support businesses and entrepreneurs across every sector.

features.title: Everything you need, in one place
features.subtitle: Carefully designed spaces and services for an exceptional work and business experience.

items.title: 67 Offices
items.desc: A variety of layouts and footprints

location.title: At the heart of Al Malqa
location.body: A strategic location on Anas bin Malik Road in North Riyadh, connecting you to the city's most important destinations with ease.
location.address: Al Malqa, Anas bin Malik Road, Riyadh

cta.title: Start your journey in a space designed for your ambition
cta.subtitle: Book a visit or receive the full project profile. Our team is ready to answer your questions.
cta.thanks: Thank you. We'll be in touch shortly.
